prompt: A highly stylized 3D caricature portrait of a man with an oversized elongated head, exaggerated jawline, massive neck, and playful asymmetrical facial expression. One eyebrow raised dramatically, one eye squinting, with a mischievous smirk and subtle stubble details. Rendered in ultra-smooth polished CGI style with realistic skin texture, soft subsurface scattering, and clean high-end 3D materials. Cinematic soft ambient studio lighting with gentle shadows and a neutral gray gradient background. Minimal composition focused entirely on the character’s humorous facial exaggeration and charming personality. Pixar-meets-modern-3D-sculpt aesthetic, highly detailed yet cartoonish, expressive and meme-worthy.
